creator: jason.chambers@earthlink.net
text:
Hello all,

Can someone revisit this bug and confirm the status ?  It looks like a
maintainer has not reviewed this since May 2008.

Should we open a new PR and link it to this one ?  Some recommend that
course of action when a PR appears abandoned.


On the FreeBSD-stable list there has been reports that an out-of-band
patch provided by a freebsd developer has resolved the issue.

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2008-October/045923.html

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2008-October/046221.html


However it appears this has not made it into FreeBSD-7.1-BETA2

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2008-October/046270.html


My own personal experience confirms the reports above.



Regards,

--Jason
